tagline: A family-friendly preview of a solo Southern Africa journey built around city lights, waterfalls, safari water, and golden-hour coastlines.
routeOrder: Johannesburg / Rosebank → Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe → Livingstone, Zambia → Kasane / Chobe → Maun / Okavango → Cape Town
backupRoute: If the return flight must stay from Johannesburg: Cape Town → Johannesburg with a large same-day buffer. If Kasane → Maun logistics do not work cleanly: save Okavango for a future Botswana trip and continue from Chobe to Cape Town.
airportStrategy: Arrive in Johannesburg. Prefer departing from Cape Town if the price and schedule work. Backup: keep a Johannesburg return and fly Cape Town → Johannesburg early with a safe buffer.
publicPrivacyNote: Some details are kept private for safety.

route.role: Arrival base + Jozi New Year energy
route.description: A familiar Rosebank base for landing, resetting, culture, and a polished New Year celebration before the waterfall and safari stretch.
route.travelFlow: International arrival into Johannesburg, then regional flight onward to Victoria Falls.

highlights.foodCultureMoment: Rosebank dining, art, and a meaningful culture stop
highlights.photoMoment: City lights and Rosebank/Sandton evening glow
highlights.eveningCityLightVibe: Tasteful New Year dinner and skyline atmosphere
highlights.wowExperience: Starting the year in Jozi before the journey opens up

route.description: The Zimbabwe side of Victoria Falls brings the dramatic rainforest walk, mist, viewpoints, and sunset river energy.
route.travelFlow: Fly from Johannesburg to Victoria Falls, then continue by road to Livingstone.

highlights.foodCultureMoment: A relaxed dinner after the Falls or a Zambezi sunset cruise
highlights.photoMoment: Falls mist, rainbow viewpoints, and golden river light
highlights.eveningCityLightVibe: Warm lodge evenings near the Zambezi
highlights.wowExperience: Standing at one of the world’s great waterfalls

route.description: A short Zambia stop for the other side of the Falls, bridge views, and a calmer riverfront moment.
route.travelFlow: Road transfer from Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe to Livingstone, Zambia, then onward to Kasane / Chobe.

highlights.foodCultureMoment: Zambezi-side meal or refined dinner experience
highlights.photoMoment: Bridge views and Zambia-side Falls angles
highlights.eveningCityLightVibe: Soft riverfront evening after the border crossing
highlights.wowExperience: Seeing Victoria Falls from a second country

route.description: A compact Chobe stop focused on river safari, elephants, hippos, crocodiles, and a morning game drive.
route.travelFlow: Road transfer from Livingstone to Kasane, with Chobe activities coordinated locally.

highlights.photoMoment: Elephants and wildlife along the Chobe River
highlights.eveningCityLightVibe: Quiet safari-lodge night under Botswana skies

route.description: Maun acts as the gateway to a full-day Okavango Delta mokoro trip and slow water-based safari scenery.
route.travelFlow: Confirm Kasane → Maun logistics before locking non-refundable activities, then fly from Maun onward to Cape Town.

highlights.mainVibe: Quiet water channels, reeds, birds, stillness
highlights.foodCultureMoment: Relaxed river dinner after the Delta day
highlights.eveningCityLightVibe: Calm Maun evening after safari travel
highlights.wowExperience: Floating through the Okavango Delta by mokoro

route.description: A relaxed Cape Town ending with beaches, food, wine, Table Mountain views, and golden-hour coastline energy.
route.travelFlow: Fly from Maun to Cape Town. Best final strategy is to depart internationally from Cape Town if possible.

highlights.foodCultureMoment: Cape Winelands or V&A / Sea Point dining
highlights.photoMoment: Signal Hill, Sea Point, Clifton, or Camps Bay sunset
highlights.eveningCityLightVibe: Waterfront lights and relaxed final dinners
highlights.wowExperience: Closing the trip with coast, mountains, and wine country

homeBases.areaOrVibe: Rosebank home base — familiar, convenient, city-smart
homeBases.notes: Hotel name hidden unless approved later. Good for arrival, dining, and short rides to evening areas.

homeBases.areaOrVibe: Victoria Falls Town — close to the waterfall and sunset activities
homeBases.notes: Hotel name hidden unless approved later. Focus is Falls access and easy activity pickup.

homeBases.areaOrVibe: Livingstone riverfront — Zambezi views and Zambia-side Falls access
homeBases.notes: Hotel name hidden unless approved later. Short stop for Zambia-side scenery.
Hotel name hidden unless approved later. Activity coordination matters more than flash.

homeBases.areaOrVibe: Maun gateway base near river or airport access
homeBases.notes: Hotel name hidden unless approved later. Base for mokoro day trip and onward flight.

homeBases.areaOrVibe: V&A Waterfront / Green Point / Sea Point finale base
homeBases.neighborhood: V&A Waterfront / Green Point / Sea Point
homeBases.notes: Hotel name hidden unless approved later. Focus is beaches, views, food, and easy airport access.

botswana.title: Botswana Safari Story
botswana.summary: Botswana is split into two family-friendly safari moments: Chobe for river wildlife and Maun / Okavango for the mokoro water experience.

capeTown.title: Cape Town Finish
capeTown.summary: The finale is built around beaches, views, food, culture, and golden-hour Cape scenery.

newYearFalls.title: New Year Energy → Victoria Falls Wonder
newYearFalls.summary: The New Year begins in Johannesburg, then the first major emotional anchor is Victoria Falls and the Zambezi.

safeToPublish: Hotel areas or names only if approved
